stages.concept:
# Unit 158: 수의 일치 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **수의 일치**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> The number of students **is** increasing.
> 학생 수가 증가하고 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주어의 수에 따라 동사도 **단수/복수**를 맞춰야 해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **단수 취급**하는 경우:

> Every student **has** a textbook. (every + 단수명사)
> Each boy **is** smart. (each + 단수명사)
> **The number of** books **is** large. (… 의 수)
> **Mathematics** is difficult. (학과명)
> **The news** is good. (뉴스)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **복수 취급**하는 경우:

> **A number of** students **are** absent. (많은 …)
> Both Tom **and** Jane **are** smart. (both A and B)
> **The police** are looking for him. (경찰)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **B에 일치**하는 경우:

> Either you **or** he **is** wrong. (either A or B → B에 일치)
> Neither she **nor** they **are** coming. (neither A nor B → B에 일치)
> Not only he **but also** I **am** right. (not only A but also B → B에 일치)

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에서 알맞은 동사를 고르세요.**
"Neither my friends nor my sister ( know / knows ) the secret."
1. know
2. knows ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 아주 좋아요. 'Neither A nor B' 구문이 주어로 쓰일 때는 동사를 더 가까이 있는 주어, 즉 'B'에 일치시켜야 해요.
B가 단수 형태인 'my sister'이므로 동사도 단수형인 'knows'를 써야 한답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: the number of(단수), a number of(복수), both A and B(복수), either/neither(B에 일치)! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 158: 수의 일치 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Everyone that heard the news (     ) really surprised.
> **정답** was

---

**02.** The number of students ? increasing.
> **정답** is

---

**03.** A number of people ? waiting outside.
> **정답** are

---

**04.** Each of the students ? a textbook.
> **정답** has

---

**05.** Neither she nor I ? wrong.
> **정답** am

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Everyone have to do their homework.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have → has

---

**07.** The number of books are large.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → is

---

**08.** A number of students is absent today.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → are

---

**09.** Each of the boys are smart.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → is

---

**10.** Neither he nor she are coming.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → is

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
모든 사람이 행복하다.
Everyone happy.
> **정답** is

---

**12.** 학생의 수가 증가하고 있다.
The number of students increasing.
> **정답** is

---

**13.** 많은 사람들이 밖에서 기다리고 있다.
A number of people waiting outside.
> **정답** are

---

**14.** 소년들 각각이 책을 가지고 있다.
Each of the boys a book.
> **정답** has

---

**15.** 그와 그녀 둘 다 오지 않는다.
Neither he nor she coming.
> **정답** is

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
모든 사람이 도착했다.
Everyone arrived has
> **정답** Everyone / has / arrived

---

**17.** 학생의 수가 줄고 있다.
The number students of is decreasing
> **정답** The / number / of / students / is / decreasing

---

**18.** 많은 아이들이 놀고 있다.
A number children of are playing
> **정답** A / number / of / children / are / playing

---

**19.** 소녀들 각각이 선물을 받았다.
Each the of girls has received a gift
> **정답** Each / of / the / girls / has / received / a / gift

---

**20.** 그녀와 나 둘 다 학생이 아니다.
Neither nor she I am a student
> **정답** Neither / she / nor / I / am / a / student
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 158: 수의 일치 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The number of babies born in Korea ______
decreased over the last ten years.
Three kilometers _____ not a very long distance for
walking.
have - are
has - is
has - are
have - is
> **정답** has - is

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Either Kelly or her little sisters ______ going to clean
the room.
Neither my mother nor my sister _____ the drama.
are - like
is - likes
are - likes
is - like
> **정답** are - likes

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
There ________ plenty of candies in the box.
Collecting coins _________ his favorite hobby.
is - are
is - is
are - is
are - are
> **정답** are - is

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Every doctor and nurse in this hospital _____ going to
take a vacation.
Most of the boys ______ playing online games.
are - like
are - likes
is - likes
is - like
> **정답** is - like

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Not only you but also John _______ to do the work.
David and Chris as well as Cristina ______ going to
join the club.
has - is
have - are
have - is
has - are
> **정답** has - are

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Not only they but also she is a teacher.
Both she and her brother play the piano well.
Some of the information are not useful for me.
Each of the students has to submit one essay
by next week.
> **정답** Some of the information are not useful for me.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Working conditions here are not good.
Most of my students are from America.
All of the members get an equal chance.
The stories I heard from my uncle was boring.
> **정답** The stories I heard from my uncle was boring.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Some of the furniture has to be removed to
create more space.
The majority of the students has submitted
their paper.
More than half of the students in my class
wear glasses.
Five years is a short time to achieve your
goal.
> **정답** The majority of the students has submitted their paper.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
A number of students in this school doesn't
want to wear school uniforms.
The number of people going abroad are
decreasing.
The rest of the students want to go home.
One-fourth of the oranges in the box tastes
sour.
> **정답** The rest of the students want to go home.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
Each of the students have to wear gloves.
All the money raised at the concert is going to
be donated.
A number of smartphone users changes their
devices within a year.
A few houses on the hill has a big garden.
> **정답** All the money raised at the concert is going to be donated.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Several members of the team was injured.
Most of the information was not true.
She as well as her parents were not satisfied
with the result.
A number of fans are waiting outside to see
the movie star.
> **정답** A number of fans are waiting outside to see the movie star., Most of the information was not true.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Most of Korean drama series is popular in
many Asian countries.
The number of people using smart watches
are increasing.
Both you and Jim are expected to participate
in the event.
These kinds of mistakes are quite common
among students.
> **정답** Both you and Jim are expected to participate in the event.
> **정답These kinds of mistakes are quite common among students.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
David도 Chris도 영어를 좋아하지 않는다.
Neither David nor Chris likes English.
Neither David or Chris like English.
Both David and Chris doesn't like English.
Both David and Chris likes English.
> **정답** Neither David nor Chris likes English.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 일을 완성하는 데 5일이면 충분하다.
Five day is enough to complete the task.
Five days are enough to complete the task.
Five day are enough to complete the task.
Five days is enough to complete the task.
> **정답** Five days is enough to complete the task.

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Most of the parents is concerned about school
violence.
Getting daily exercise is important.
Everyone have been quite cooperative so far.
Physics is the most difficult of all subjects.
> **정답** Everyone have been quite cooperative so far., Most of the parents is concerned about school violence.

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Both wheat and corn are grown in Kansas.
Most of the money were spent on shopping.
Every student wear a school uniform.
None of cake was left.
> **정답** Most of the money were spent on shopping., Every student wear a school uniform.

---

**17.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
No one are particularly happy with his
decision.
All of my valuables is in the bag.
More than twenty students are said to be
interested in science.
Making films often takes a lot of time and
effort.
> **정답** All of my valuables is in the bag., No one are particularly happy with his decision.

---

**18.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
Listening to K-pop is one of his favorite
hobbies.
To save enough money for the trip is his initial
plan.
Each of the members use their own laptop.
How much time is we allowed to use for
making the product?
> **정답** How much time is we allowed to use for making the product?, Each of the members use their own laptop.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Each of the questions are
worth 10 points.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → is

---

**20.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
All of the users has to
change their passwords.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has → have

The number of tourists visiting Korea ______ increased over the last five years.
Two hours _____ not a very long time for studying. have - are has - is has - are have - is

Either Tom or his brothers ______ going to wash the dishes.

Not only you but also Amy _______ to finish the task.

has - is have - are have - is has - are
> 정답: has - are

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Not only he but also she is a musician.
Both he and his sister study science well.
Some of the data are not accurate for us.
Each of the participants has to register by next Monday.

Living conditions here are not ideal.
Most of my classmates are from Seoul.
All of the members get an equal opportunity.
The paintings I saw at the gallery was impressive.
> 정답: The paintings I saw at the gallery was impressive.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Some of the equipment has to be replaced to improve safety.

More than half of the students in my class ride bicycles.
Ten years is a long time to master a skill.

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
A number of residents in this area doesn't want to pay higher taxes.
The number of visitors going to the park are increasing.
The rest of the cookies want to be eaten.
One-third of the apples in the basket tastes sweet.
> 정답: The rest of the cookies want to be eaten.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
Each of the members have to bring their own supplies.
All the water collected from the river is going to be tested.
A number of tablet users changes their devices within two years.
A few buildings on the street has a rooftop garden.

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Several members of the club was absent.
Most of the milk was already expired.
He as well as his parents were not satisfied with the service.
A number of customers are waiting in line to buy tickets.
> 정답: A number of customers are waiting in line to buy

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Most of Korean movies is popular in many countries.
The number of students using laptops are growing.
Both you and she are expected to attend the event. ceremony.
These types of errors are quite common among beginners.
> 정답: Both you and she are expected to attend the event.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom도 Amy도 수학을 좋아하지 않는다.
Neither Tom nor Amy likes math.
Neither Tom or Amy like math.
Both Tom and Amy doesn't like math.
Both Tom and Amy likes math.

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 프로젝트를 완성하는 데 3주면 충분하다.

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Most of the teachers is concerned about student behavior.
Getting enough sleep is important.
Everyone have been quite supportive so far.
Mathematics is the most challenging of all subjects.
> 정답: Everyone have been quite supportive so far., Most of the parents is concerned about school violence.

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Both rice and bread are eaten daily.
Most of the juice were spilled on the floor.
Every student wear a name tag.
None of the cake was left.
> 정답: Most of the juice were spilled on the floor., Every

**17.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
No one are particularly excited about the announcement.
All of my belongings is in the locker.
More than thirty students are said to be interested in art.
Teaching languages often takes a lot of patience and time.
> 정답: All of my belongings is in the locker., No one are particularly happy with his decision.

---

**18.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
Listening to podcasts is one of her daily routines.
To earn enough money for the trip is his main goal.
Each of the players use their own equipment.
How much time is we allowed to use for the presentation?
> 정답: How much time is we allowed to use for the product?, Each of the members use their own laptop.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰시오. Each  of  the  problems  are worth  5  points. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: are → is

---

**20.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
All  of  the  members  has  to submit  their  reports. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> 정답: has → have
